text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohh... Oww... Uugh, I think a headache is coming
on...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My head suddenly hurts... I don't think it's
because of a cold...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I haven't tripped yet today, either... What could
be the reason? Nghh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Owie! Ow ow! It's starting to hurt again...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That's true... I do feel like too much thinking
sometimes gives me a headache.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Which means... maybe I should stop thinking
altogether? O-okay, no more thinking. Don't
think.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... But I can't finish the day without
reflecting on my actions!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ow! Ow ow ow! I'm not sure if I can stop
thinking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to stop her ruminating, Meisho Doto
agonizes over her headache.
